add.description: Add a tag to a task

remove.description: Remove a tag from a task

name.description: The name of the project to create

assignee.description: Set Assignee on the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

assignee_status.description: Set Assignee status on the task (requires Assignee)

completed.description: Whether the task should be marked completed

due_on.description: Date on which the time is due

liked.description: Whether the task is liked by the authorized user

workspace.description: The workspace to create the subtask in. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

name.description: The new name of the task

projects.description: The project to filter tasks on. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

opt_fields.description: Defines fields to return. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

workspace.description: The workspace in which to get users. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

id.description: The ID of the project to update the data of

assignee.description: The assignee to filter tasks on. Note: If you specify assignee, you must also specify the workspace to filter on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

opt_fields.description: Defines fields to return. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

project.description: The project to filter tasks on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

section.description: The section to filter tasks on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

workspace.description: The workspace to filter tasks on. Note: If you specify workspace, you must also specify the assignee to filter on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

completed_since.description: Only return tasks that are either incomplete or that have been completed since this time

modified_since.description: Only return tasks that have been modified since the given time

projectId.description: Project to show the sections of. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

section.description: The Section to move the task to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

completed.description: Whether the task is marked completed

text.description: Text to search for in name or notes

isTextHtml.description: Whether body is HTML or simple text

text.description: Comment as HTML string. Do not use together with plain text.

insert_after.description: A task in the project to insert the task after, or null to insert at the beginning of the list

insert_before.description: A task in the project to insert the task before, or null to insert at the end of the list

section.description: A section in the project to insert the task into. The task will be inserted at the bottom of the section.

due_on.description: The day on which this project is due. This takes a date with format YYYY-MM-DD.

notes.description: Basic description or notes for the project

privacy_setting.description: The privacy setting of the project

archived.description: Whether to only return projects whose archived field takes on the value of this parameter

team.description: The new name of the task. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

project.description: The project where the task will be removed from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

tag.description: The tag that should be added. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

userId.description: An identifier for the user to get data of. Can be one of an email address,the globally unique identifier for the user, or the keyword me to indicate the current user making the request.

team.description: The team this project will be assigned to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

due_on.description: The day on which this project is due. This takes a date with format YYYY-MM-DD.

notes.description: Basic description or notes for the project

owner.description: The new assignee/cardinal for this project

privacy_setting.description: The privacy setting of the project

team.description: The team this project will be assigned to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
